coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Relax. Breathe. Enjoy the ride. 5:51 of engine-building.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Aerobic base building. 70% for 5:51. This is the foundation of all fitness.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 0% into session. Endurance work is never wasted. Every minute builds your foundation.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Zone 2: where excitement goes to retire. 5:51 of controlled boredom.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 0% into ride. Smooth and steady. Build your aerobic base.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Halfway: 15% done. Patience builds power, not suffering. Stay easy.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 5 minutes of Z2 work. 85-95 rpm, Seated. Smooth, relaxed pedaling.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Building the base. 5:00 at 55%. This is where champions are made.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: The hardest part of easy rides is keeping them easy. 55%, 85-95 rpm. Stay disciplined.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 15% complete. 27 minutes left. Let your mind wander. Stay in zone.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Relax. Breathe. Enjoy the ride. 5:00 of engine-building.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 28% through. Low intensity, high volume. Building the engine from ground up.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 65% FTP, 85-95 rpm. Relax and enjoy this. You're building massive aerobic capacity.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Halfway: 28% complete. Fun fact: most people go too hard on easy days. Don't be most people.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 28% into ride. Smooth and steady. Build your aerobic base.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: First rep. 80% FTP. Your body is uncomfortable. Your mind is stronger. Prove it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 3 of 7. Target: 80% FTP, 85-95 rpm. 4 intervals remaining.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Interval 3/7. Every rep makes you stronger. Keep pushing. 4 more to go.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 41% done. 4 intervals left. Only. ONLY. *nervous laughter*
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 3. 4 to go. 17 minutes total. You've got this.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/7. 5:00 at 90%. This hurts because it's supposed to. Set the tone.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 4. 15min of work accumulated. Quality over quantity from here.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 54% done. 3 intervals left. You've come this far. Finish strong.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 4/7. Your legs have opinions. Management has reviewed them. Denied.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Rep 4/7. 90% FTP, 85-95 rpm. Controlled effort. Execute the plan.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 68% through. 100% at 85-95 rpm. Your legs are burning. Perfect. That's lactate threshold working.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 68% through session. Block 1/1. You've done 20min of threshold work.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 2 blocks to go. 9 minutes. This discomfort is temporary. The fitness is permanent.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 25 minutes in. Your lactate threshold called. It's filing a complaint.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 68% complete. 100% for 3:00. Don't let power spike. Stay smooth.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 1 reps left. 8 minutes total. Your competition quit 10 minutes ago.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Rep 6/7. 1:00 at 115%. Cadence: 90-105 rpm. Seated. 1 intervals remaining.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: You've done 23 minutes of hard work. You can do 1 more intervals. Believe it.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Deep into it. Your lungs will remember this moment. So will your neighbors from the screaming.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 28 minutes in. 115% FTP, 90-105 rpm. This builds your race-winning power.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 60% for 5:00. Easy miles make fast racing. Stop overthinking.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 5:00 at 60%. This should feel easy. If breathing hard, you're going too hard.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: This easy work is the foundation. 60%, Seated. Trust the process.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 78% done. Your Garmin thinks you fell asleep. You're actually training. Allegedly.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 60%, 85-95 rpm, Seated. Base miles. The work no one sees but everyone needs.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. 34 minutes in. Your legs are lying. You have more.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1 of 1. Target: 60% FTP, 85-100 rpm. 0 intervals remaining.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Interval 1/1. Every rep makes you stronger. Keep pushing. 0 more to go.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 91% done. 0 intervals left. Only. ONLY. *nervous laughter*
